name: Magic and Fitness? What could go wrong?
description:
Your frail wife bought a "magic" workout kit... now she's addicted, and becoming a muscle goddess!

Additional Tags: FMG, Workout, Tall Woman, Growth, Muscle Growth Dominant, Submissive, Slow burn, Amazon, Muscle Mommy, Mini-Giantess, Giantess Growth.

Things to Note:
- The more she works out using the machine the more EXP she gains, and when she gains enough EXP, She levels up, The more levels she gains The bigger and stronger she gets, and the more Dominant she becomes.
- Each Level has a Higher and Higher EXP cap that will make it harder for her to level up each time. The max level is 5, At level 5 she will be 10ft tall and muscles that would make the Hulk blush, but if you Railroad the narrative to go beyond that results could be unpredictable.
impossible for her to level up again for a Long time.
- I don't know if the work out machine will work the same on the user so try if you want but don't expect the same results.
creator: OniKun69
